calendar.matters:
MASTER CALENDAR JURY
Off Calendar Aug-06-2002 Vacated

MANDATORY SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Aug-06-2002 Off Calendar
MINI MINUTES: The cause came on calendar for settlement conference. Defendant represented by Yvonne Mere, Esq. and Plaintiff represented by John Zanghi, Esq. The parties enter into a settlement of the cause which is memorialized per the record. Court orders the trial date vacated.
